---
title: "Contact & References"
---

### Get in Touch

Feel free to reach out for academic collaboration, project enquiries, or professional opportunities.

::: {style="display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap:20px; max-width:790px; margin-bottom:2rem;"}

::: {.card style="padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 1.5px 6px var(--accent); text-align:center;"}
<i class="bi bi-envelope" style="font-size:1.5rem; color:var(--accent);"></i>

[tom.blume2@mail.dcu.ie](tom.blume2@mail.dcu.ie)
:::

::: {.card style="padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 1.5px 6px var(--accent); text-align:center;"}
<i class="bi bi-linkedin" style="font-size:1.5rem; color:var(--accent);"></i>

[LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/tom-bme)
:::

::: {.card style="padding:20px; border-radius:10px; box-shadow:0 1.5px 6px var(--accent); text-align:center;"}
<i class="bi bi-github" style="font-size:1.5rem; color:var(--accent);"></i>

[GitHub](https://github.com/tombme-5214)
:::

:::

---

### Professional & Academic References

> References are available upon request.
